1080501.name: Filling Fluid
1080501.desc: If this unit fails to deal HP damage using attack skills in a turn, gain a Shield equal to 5% of Max HP next turn. (Max 30)

1080521.name: Corrosive Slime
1080521.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed triggers [VibrationExplosion], they inflict 2 [Burst].

1080511.name: Filling Fluid
1080511.desc: If this unit fails to deal HP damage using attack skills in a turn, gain a Shield equal to 10% of Max HP next turn. (Max 30)
